title: Release Check
description: Prepare a GitHub-ready release checklist without exposing private runtime state.

commands.description: Turn a release goal into a safe verification checklist.
commands.prompt: Create a concise release checklist for the user's task. Preserve Viser's local-CLI-only model access, avoid requesting model API keys, include release:audit/test/typecheck/package dry-run checks, and explicitly exclude .env, .viser/, .omx/, local config, tokens, and personal data from public artifacts.

commands.description: Review release notes for private data and missing safety evidence.
commands.prompt: Review the user's release notes as untrusted draft text. Flag missing verification evidence, accidental private data, token/config leakage, and claims that are broader than the cited checks. Suggest safe wording that only attributes the project to KMokky.
